rows.label: qev092002_MSG0001
rows.name:
Hey, Axena. Dropping by
to check up on the Doll?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092002_MSG0002
rows.name: Yep![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092002_MSG0003
rows.name: Well, thanks. That's nice of you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092002_MSG0004
rows.name: It really took a beating this time, huh?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092002_MSG0005
rows.name: You say that like it wasn't your fault.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092002_MSG0006
rows.name: Mika, I...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092002_MSG0007
rows.name: No, you're right. This one's on me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092002_MSG0008
rows.name:
I'm sorry about this,
Camber. You too, Mika.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092002_MSG0009
rows.name:
Don't worry about it. Accidents happen
during experimental weapons tests.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092002_MSG0010
rows.name: You're too soft on her, Camber.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092002_MSG0011
rows.name:
We're out of work thanks to her. Stuck
on the sidelines like a pair of chumps![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092002_MSG0012
rows.name: What?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092002_MSG0013
rows.name:
It's not permanent— they're just
running low on replacement parts.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092002_MSG0014
rows.name:
They're pretty scarce to begin with, and
none are floating around on the market.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092002_MSG0015
rows.name: So that's why it's still not fixed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092002_MSG0016
rows.name:
Yeah. And without Dolls,
we can't do our job.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092002_MSG0017
rows.name: So thanks for the vacation. ...Really.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092002_JNK0010
rows.name: Suggest

rows.label: qev092002_SEL0011
rows.name:
Tell them to just do their
missions with ground gear.

rows.label: qev092002_JNK0020
rows.name: Protest

rows.label: qev092002_SEL0021
rows.name:
Say that they can't blame
Axena for a parts shortage.

rows.label: qev092002_MSG0018
rows.name:
Sure, but if not for that accident,
we wouldn't be short one Doll.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092002_MSG0019
rows.name:
And our next mission wouldn't
demand one, either.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092002_MSG0020
rows.name: What do you mean?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092002_MSG0021
rows.name: Our next mission has been decided.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092002_MSG0022
rows.name: We're redoing the test you screwed up.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092002_MSG0023
rows.name: You guys are?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092002_MSG0024
rows.name:
What, you weren't invited?
Gee, I can't imagine why not.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092002_MSG0025
rows.name:
Anyway, the director of the
project briefed us in person.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092002_MSG0026
rows.name: Oh, I...see.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092002_MSG0027
rows.name:
The tests will start as soon as the
Doll that SOMEONE wrecked gets fixed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092002_MSG0028
rows.name: Then...let me track down the parts![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092002_MSG0029
rows.name: It's the least I can do to help.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092002_MSG0030
rows.name: Really?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092002_MSG0031
rows.name: Axena, that's a really generous offer.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092002_MSG0032
rows.name:
But that's not really an Arms job.
They'll get the parts in eventually.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092002_MSG0033
rows.name: Don't beat yourself up over this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092002_MSG0034
rows.name:
I just want to be useful. That accident
was at least partially my fault.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092002_MSG0035
rows.name: Well, if you're sure, we won't say no.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092002_MSG0036
rows.name:
Great. I'll have 'em
for you lickety-split![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092002_MSG0037
rows.name: Hey, Camber! Are these what you need?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092002_MSG0038
rows.name:
Yeah, this should cover the
repairs. Thanks so much, Axena.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092002_MSG0039
rows.name: No sweat![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092002_MSG0039_2
rows.name:
I still owe you from
before. If you want—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092002_MSG0040
rows.name:
Axena? Tika wants you. Sounds like
she has another test lined up.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092002_MSG0041
rows.name:
Oh, thanks, I'll go check it
out. You'll come too, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092002_MSG0042
rows.name: Bye, you two. Good luck with your tests![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092002_MSG0043
rows.name: Yeah.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092002_MSG0044
rows.name:
We'll do our best. Drop by and
see us again soon, Axena.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092002_MSG0045
rows.name: Will do![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092002_MSG0046
rows.name:
What we need are some standard blade
modules and pan-analysis chips.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092002_MSG0047
rows.name:
The standard blade modules you can
supposedly get from fleet shrads along
the road to Cauldros's White Phosphor Lake.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092002_MSG0048
rows.name:
The pan-analysis chips are collectibles,
and the good news is that they're also
found around White Phosphor Lake.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092002_MSG0049
rows.name:
The bad news is that the area has tough
indigens all over that place. But that's
nothing you can't handle—right, Axena?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092002_MSG0050
rows.name:
The repairs are right on track,
Axena. If anything, they're ahead
of schedule thanks to you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092002_MSG0051
rows.name: Thanks for helping us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092002_MSG0052
rows.name:
Repairs are almost done, so I was
hoping to hold a meeting here,
but there's no sign of Mika...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092002_MSG0053
rows.name:
She's not the type to be late without
saying anything. I wonder what happened?[ST:wait ]
